Off Calendar Jan-24-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day. Commissioner: Loretta M. Norris; Clerk: P. Dias; Reporter: Ron Sinclair. Lawrence J. Less, Esq. represented the plaintiff. Petitioner, Tris Newyear Thomson, sworn and examined. Court notes for the record that default was entered against James Joseph Frisby, II on December 11, 2002. On the basis of evidence received, the Court grants judgment as follows: Principal: $15,000.00; Pre-judgment interest: $2,625.00; Costs: $1,749.35 for a total judgment of $19,374.35. Judgment signed in open court.
